items.question: Review draft PR: polish/social-meta-tags
items.context: Night-builder opened PR #1 on Taylorblue123/crumbs. Adds OG + Twitter + WeChat meta + 1200x630 OG image. Build is green. Not merged. See https://github.com/Taylorblue123/crumbs/pull/1

items.question: How should I bootstrap the personal site?
items.context: BedRock repo is docs/context only, no web scaffold. Three paths — pick one and I'll ship the first draft tonight.
